codeReview.summary: Implemented ordered MCP lifecycle phases (VAL-MCP-002) with 5 phases: ConfigLoad → ServerRegistration → SpawnConnect → InitializeHandshake → ToolDiscovery. The implementation is correct with proper phase ordering enforced via Ord trait on McpLifecyclePhase, sequential phase transitions in McpLifecycleState, and lifecycle tracking in McpConfigManager.start_server() and McpClient.connect_with_lifecycle(). 14 tests added and passing, clippy clean.

issues.description: test_lifecycle_phases_execute_in_order only verifies ConfigLoad and SpawnConnect completion for healthy servers, but doesn't verify InitializeHandshake or ToolDiscovery. This is a test coverage gap, but the phases ARE correctly implemented in connect_with_lifecycle() and list_tools_with_lifecycle().

summary: PASS - Feature mcp-lifecycle-phases correctly implements VAL-MCP-002. All 5 lifecycle phases (ConfigLoad → ServerRegistration → SpawnConnect → InitializeHandshake → ToolDiscovery) are implemented with proper ordering and sequential phase transitions. McpConfigManager marks ServerRegistration before calling connect(). McpClient tracks ConfigLoad, SpawnConnect, InitializeHandshake in connect_with_lifecycle(), and ToolDiscovery in list_tools_with_lifecycle(). Phase failures are reported with the specific phase that failed via McpLifecycleError. 14 tests pass, clippy clean.
